fields.name: Miniform Code
fields.tooltip: Contains the code of the miniform header to which the line is attached.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Contains the number of the line in the miniform. The program numbers the lines automatically and sequentially.

fields.name: Area
fields.tooltip: Specifies the area of the customer or vendor, for the purpose of reporting to INTRASTAT.

fields.name: Field Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of data that is defined in the miniform line.

fields.name: Table No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the table in the program from which the data comes or in which it is entered.

fields.name: Field No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the field from which the data comes or in which the data is entered.

fields.name: Text
fields.tooltip: Specifies text if the field type is Text.

fields.name: Field Length
fields.tooltip: Specifies the maximum length of the field value.

fields.name: Call Miniform
fields.tooltip: Specifies which miniform will be called when the user on the handheld selects the choice on the line.
